control_card.F: Missing imports, missing markers, or promoted gates fail validation.
control_card.G: This checker does not infer a theorem or promotion from comments.
control_card.L: Scan the Agda receipt text deterministically and emit a JSON check receipt.
control_card.O: Owner 5 validates the TheoremG/Q2/GD1 contradiction-channel receipt.
control_card.R: Require the composite route to be recorded while all hard analytic discharge and promotion gates remain explicitly false.
control_card.S: A receipt passes only if the five dependency imports are present, the route-recorded field is true, and every Q2/GD1/TheoremG/BKM/Clay discharge flag remains false.
